titleStmt.title: SII 26.574: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 574.

summary.p: On a slab lying infront of the Āñjanēya temple.

p.hi: Śaka 1699, Hēvalmbi, Srāvana śuº 15—1777 A.D., August 18, Monday.

summary.p: It states that during the rule of Mallarāju Guṁḍarājaṇi, A[ppikṭṭai] Varushaya Rāmaya, son of Mukunda, grandson of Rāghavulu belonging to Nāgunēḷḷa-gōtra, at the instance of the priest Mārepalli Purushōttam got the maṇḍapa, in front of the temple of Āñjanēya which had been in ruins, reconstructed and reconsecreated the deity, for which a grant of a quarter vēli of dry and wet land of sowing capacity of kavili-kuṁcheḍu, with the permission of divāṇa for the worship and food-offerings to the same deity. The temple was situated to the east of the village Juvvulakaṃṭi in Bellaṁkoṁḍa-sīma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbu
lu 1699 Agunēṭihēvaḷaṁbināma
saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śu . 15 lu . śrī
bellaṁkoṁḍa śīmalō juvvulakaṁṭi
grāmanaku prāgbhāgamaṁdu śrī
Āṁjanēya svāmivāri pū
rvamaina Ālayaṁ khila
mai vuṁḍagānu rājeśrī malla
rāju guṁḍā rā yaṇiṁgāru
prabhutvaṁ cēśē kālamaṁdunu yī
stalaṁ A¨rcakuḍu mārepalli puruṣō
ttamuṇi prōtsāhaṁ cātanu nā
gunēḷḷa gōtrōdbhavulunnu rāgha
vulugāri pautrulunnu mukuṁ
duṇigāri putrulunnu Ayni A
ppikaṭṭi varuṣuyarāmaya
gāru punaḥ maṁḍapaṁ kaṭṭiṁ
ci pratiṣṭha cēśi nitya naivēdya dīpā
rādhanaku gānu divāṇaṁvā
riniAḍgi pātika velipolamunnu kavili
kuṁceḍu vittanāla varimaḍinni sa
ma¨rppiṁci vēyiṁcina dharmaśāsana
ṁ . yīkaiṁkaryamu Ācaṁdrā¨rka sthā
yigānu kona navadhariṁcavale
nū . madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpati va
ṁśajā vāḥ . yē bhūmi pāssata
ta mujvala dharmacittāḥ . madhaddharmamē
va paripālanamācaraṁti tva
tvā du kādvayamahaṁ śirasā va
hāmi . śrī śrī jēyunū .
gaṁggavarapu buccana vrālū .
Digital edition of SII 26.574 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
